title: HVAC Annual Service - HQ
description: Annual preventive maintenance on 4 rooftop HVAC units. Filter replacement coil cleaning and refrigerant check. Schedule during low-occupancy weekend.

title: Parking Lot Restriping - Dallas Office
description: Restripe parking lot including ADA spaces fire lane markings and directional arrows. Sealcoat application prior to striping.

title: Elevator Annual Inspection - HQ
description: State-required annual elevator inspection and certification. Contact otis for scheduling. Certificate must be posted in cab.

title: Exterior Caulking & Sealants - Denver
description: Annual inspection and replacement of failed exterior caulking at window perimeters and building joints. Winter weather causes deterioration.
